description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a low perimeter wall and landscaped with palm trees and a large leafy tree. The structure features extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere, and includes multiple rooms arranged around a central courtyard with a rectangular pool. The exterior is finished in white and light gray tones, with clean lines and a flat roof, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The backyard area is spacious, with a green lawn and outdoor seating, while the front entry is defined by a pathway flanked by plants. The house appears to have several sliding glass doors, providing direct access to the outdoor spaces. The overall design is open and airy, with a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with floor-to-ceiling windows, a central pool courtyard, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, a flat roof, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, and landscaped entryway with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard lawn, large tree, and rear-facing windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central pool, patio area, and extensive glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side lawn, outdoor seating, and additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wide glass door, flanked by tall windows and landscaped with palm trees and a paved path; minimal overhang and no porch.
